Eye of the Rigtorgn  
 

Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 1H Blunt Atk Delay: 25
DMG: 25 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STA: +10 HP: +100 MANA: +25
WT: 8.0 Size: TINY
Class: SHD
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Eye of the Rigtorgn
Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 1H Blunt Atk Delay: 25
DMG: 25 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STA: +10 HP: +100 MANA: +25
WT: 8.0 Size: TINY
Class: SHD
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Type:1H Blunt
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Edano
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-07-27 10:02:32
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 55
[Drops | Comments ]

This item is found on creatures.

NPC Name

Temple of Veeshan

was raiding ToV for armor with my raid group and took down Gozz, This was 1 of 3 items to drop and lucky me being the only SK in the raid, so now its what to use this or my Darkmetal Falchion from Hate :)

Edited, Mon Oct 14 00:52:44 2002

#REDACTED, Posted: Oct 05 2002 at 5:57 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) This was actually upgraded a while ago my friend got it at least 2 months ago and it was 25/25 then so is it just Allakhazams that was slow on getting the item change into their database or has something else changed about it? Because me personally I would LOVE to have this item IF the look didnt look like an Icecream Cone LOL. I am hoping that the thing that was changed recently was the LOOK. Please can someone post you has seen it recently? Thank you.
10-3 it is diff

we got this item today ..But it has been upgraded to 25/25 with same stats very very awesome weapon .

121 posts
Too bad 1h sucks for a hybrid

2h much better.... You don't lose near as much melee from casting inbetween swings. 1h is for dual wield classes

Use this with shield when you need the hps for CH cycle

And it's good to see SK weapons going to paladins too

check this out ... Mace of Shadowed souls 19/29

drops in COM .. the DPM is greater on this weapon than the MoSS .. it is an upgarde .. albeit a Long awaited one. However this is a fairly decent weapon when you have little STA gear. Plus tell em you wouldn't mind having 100 hps more. Granted it may be half a hit from GOD mobs but hey.. it is half a hti more.

Were you serious when you said this sucks? If you were, then you are one of the biggest idiots i've ever seen. This weapon is incredible. Of course it's hard to obtain, but don't label a weapon crap just because of that. Not only does this have an amazing ratio, but it gives you an extra 151 hit points. Nuff said, you suck
